7:59.arabic: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ
7:59.english: We sent Nuh to his people, and he said: O my people, worship Allah — you have no god other than Him.
7:59.score_notes: Nuh's call — the same words repeated by every prophet. Pattern dropped from v2 table. Audio already downloaded.

lesson_use.rejection_reason: Pattern (مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ غَيْرُهُ) dropped from v2 table.

7:138.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمُوسَى ٱجْعَل لَّنَآ إِلَـٰهًا كَمَا لَهُمْ ءَالِهَةٌ
7:138.english: They said: O Musa, make for us a god like the gods they have.
7:138.score_notes: Israelites' shocking request — right after being saved from Pharaoh. Both singular and plural in one phrase. Audio already downloaded.

lesson_use.rejection_reason: Replaced by shorter 6:74 fragment for آلِهَة.
